content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (May 4, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
May 4, 2026, saw significant expansion of the ElizaOS ecosystem, headlined by the migration of `plugin-slack` into the monorepo and major infrastructure updates to support monetized cloud-based container apps. Development focused on refining n8n workflow integrations, stabilizing cloud authentication flows, and introducing extensive LifeOps capabilities.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

### Cloud Infrastructure & Monetization
*   Implemented support for monetized container app domains, including route ownership checks, Cloudflare domain management, and deployment status handling ([#7376](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7376)).
*   Resolved multiple authentication and session synchronization issues for the Cloud dashboard and CLI login flows ([#7361](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7361), [#7360](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7360), [#7359](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7359), [#7367](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7367)).
*   Fixed billing data fetch loops and consolidated Pages Functions for improved stability ([#7374](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7374), [#7357](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7357)).

### Plugin Migrations & Workflow Enhancements
*   Migrated `@elizaos/plugin-slack` into the monorepo, centralizing its service and action definitions ([#7375](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7375)).
*   Enhanced n8n workflow generation with structured clarification requests, improved prompt rules, and better handling of prose-trailed JSON responses ([#7373](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7373), [#7369](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7369), [#7372](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7372)).
*   Added UI support for inline clarification quick-picks in `AutomationsView` ([#7341](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7341)).

### LifeOps & Agent Core
*   Introduced extensive LifeOps code, including activity reporting, health monitoring, inbox management, and proactive planning modules ([#7356](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7356)).
*   Fixed agent configuration issues, including skipping vault sentinels in environment variable application ([#7368](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7368)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#7379](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7379): Dependency update for `hono`.
*   [#7378](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7378): Fix to preserve `agentEntry.settings` during character configuration builds.
*   [#7348](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7348): Dependency update for `typescript`.
*   *Note: Several dependency maintenance PRs ([#7353](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7353), [#7352](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7352), [#7351](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7351), [#7350](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7350), [#7349](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7349)) were autoclosed.*

## CLOSED ISSUES

### Integration Proposals
*   [#7366](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7366): Integration proposal for CAJAL, a specialized scientific paper generation character, was reviewed and closed.

## NEW ISSUES

### Agent Runtime & Orchestration
*   [#7362](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7362): Agents hallucinate a lack of task/memory tools when infrastructure is present but not surfaced.
*   [#7364](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7364): Telegram wrapper bypasses agent runtime, resulting in text-only interaction without skill/action dispatch.
*   [#7365](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7365): `--dangerously-skip-permissions` flag fails to bypass confirmation loops in the agent-orchestrator.

### UI & Performance
*   [#7363](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7363): Activity panel experiences flickering under high-volume WebSocket events due to lack of state coalescing.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   *No active issues currently meet the criteria of having more than 3 comments.*
